name: Granny Smith Buckwheat Muffins
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Apples, Granny Smith; peeled and diced into 1/4 inch pieces (about 1.5 lbs)
1 cup Buckwheat flour; light or whole
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss together apples and sugar in a large bowl.
2. Whisk or beat together eggs, oil, and vanilla extract.
3. Stir together well the buckwheat flour, whole wheat flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt.
4. Stir egg mixture into apple mixture.
5. Add flour mixture to the apple mixture and stir just enough to combine (batter will be stiff).
6. Stir in raisins and walnuts.
7. Divide batter among 16 to 18 well-greased muffin cups.
8. Bake in the middle of a 325°F oven for 25-30 minutes.
9. Serve warm or cold.
